title: crepis urundica
intro: Crepis urundica, also known as Hawk's Beak or Sea Hawk's Beak, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crepis urundica include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antibacterial properties. Crepis urundica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
